title: Data supporting separate luminous structures leading positive leader steps
author: Shengxin huang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The data supports the manuscript entitled "separate luminous structures leading positive leader steps".  The *.xlsx file contains the applied voltage waveform and discharge current waveform, and can be opened by Excel. The *.rar file contains the high-speed video frames, and can be decompressed and opened. The data can be used freely for scientific purposes with appropriate citation.
steps_raw: The data supports the manuscript entitled "separate luminous structures leading positive leader steps".  The *.xlsx file contains the applied voltage waveform and discharge current waveform, and can be opened by Excel.
